items.briefing:
Mac users should be cautious of a new malware strain that disguises itself as legitimate software from Google, Microsoft, or Apple. Once installed, it creates a backdoor on macOS devices, potentially giving attackers ongoing access. Separately, unpatched vulnerabilities in Windows systems continue to be exploited, and the latest Verizon security report highlights that many organisations are struggling to keep up with the volume of software vulnerabilities they face — a real concern for any Australian RTO running older or unmanaged systems.

**Practical tip:** Ensure staff only download software from official, verified sources — never from pop-ups or unexpected email links.

featured.title: Global 2000 downtime costs rise to USD $600 billion
featured.quote: Global 2000 downtime costs rising to $600 billion annually directly impacts Australian enterprises.
